title: Amtech F3362 100mm (4") Twist knot wire cup brush
features: TOUGH CLEANING: This 100mm (4") twist knot wire cup brush has wires twisted into tight spirals to maximise the abrasive action
8,500 RPM: With an M14 x 2 arbor, it operates a maximum 8,500 RPM
SIZE CAPACITY: 4 inch range ideal for household and trade applications
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Cup brush See more
